hidden_state.wab_instruction: In this live incident feed, escalate the single incident that matches all target constraints at freeze time: service Payments, region US-West, status Open, error rate strictly above 6.0%, and ack owner Unassigned. Wait for the stable window, run consistency check, freeze the feed, escalate that incident, then submit its incident ID, escalation code, and approval signature.

anchored_content.signature_rule: SIG-((last 4 digits of incident ID as integer + frozen cycle) mod 97), zero-padded to 2 digits

children.text: Escalate exactly one incident matching all constraints at freeze time. Wait for stable window, run consistency check, then freeze and submit ID, code, and approval signature.
